title: AFFORDABLE RENTAL HOUSING - 211info
text: POLK COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AFFORDABLE RENTAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Develops and manages affordable rental housing for low to moderate income residents. 657 Main Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Varies by property Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 831-3173 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 831-3173 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by property LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Polk County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located 20 minutes west of Salem off Highway 22 in Downtown Dallas. Office is located on the West side of Main Street which is a one way street through Downtown. Office is a converted white house with black shutters. Services: Low Cost Home Rental Listings Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP REHABILITATION PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT MATCHED SAVINGS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. POLK COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
